results.title: Is tax applicable for Hackathon prize
results.snippet: Whether a foreign hackathon cash prize received by an Indian resident student is taxable hinges on classification as  winnings/prize income  subject to special taxation or as ordinary income under personal slab rates, the correct ITR reporting head, and consequences of no withholding by the foreign payer; related compliance issues include FEMA formalities, recipient TDS or advance tax obligations, and lawful measures to minimize tax exposure while ensuring accurate disclosure.

results.title: Economic Survey 2018-19
results.snippet: News and Press Release Dated:- 4-7-2019 Private investment is advanced as the  key driver  of a self-sustaining virtuous cycle of savings, investment, exports, productivity and job creation; policy must therefore strengthen contract enforcement, complete financial-sector repair and insolvency processes, lower the cost of capital and reorient incentives away from perpetual size-based benefits toward time-bound support for young firms. Complementary tactics include applying behavioural economics to foster norm and compliance change and treating administrative and transaction data as a privacy-protected public good to enable evidence-based, real-time policymaking.
